name: Hou Set Parameter
description: Set a parameter value on a Houdini node. Provide the full node path, parameter name, and the value.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    from src.utils.hou_bridge import get_bridge

    node_path = inputs.get('node_path') or self.get_parameter('node_path', '')
    parm_name = inputs.get('parm_name') or self.get_parameter('parm_name', '')
    value = inputs.get('value')
    if value is None:
        value = self.get_parameter('value', '')

    if not node_path or not parm_name:
        self.log_error('Node path and parameter name are required')
        await self.set_output('success', False)
        await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
        return {'success': False}

    try:
        bridge = get_bridge()
        bridge.set_parm(node_path, parm_name, value)
        self.log_info(f'Set {node_path}/{parm_name} = {value}')
        await self.set_output('success', True)
    except Exception as e:
        self.log_error(f'Failed to set parameter: {e}')
        await self.set_output('success', False)

    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'success': self.get_parameter('success', False)}
